arts.ttl: Man Utd dropped plans to wear rainbow jackets at weekend after a player refused
arts.sum: The Athletic reports that the player was full-back Noussair Mazraoui, who is said to have cited his Muslim faith.

arts.ttl: Man Utd flop and new Arsenal signing named in Team of the Year
arts.sum: Manchester United flop Joshua Zirkzee and new Arsenal signing Riccardo Calafiori were both named in the Serie A Team of the Year for 2024. Man Utd flop and new Arsenal signing named in Team of the Year

arts.ttl: United back Mazraoui over LBGTQ+ jacket stance
arts.sum: Man United have reaffirmed their commitment to including fans from "all backgrounds" but have said players are "entitled to hold their own individual opinions" after Noussair Mazraoui opted against wearing a jacket in support of the LGBTQ+ community.

arts.ttl: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim could repeat Ruud van Nistelrooy tactic vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim will be forced into making at least two changes for Wednesday night's clash with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy 'confirms' Manchester United reunion after Erik ten Hag decision
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as Ruud van Nistelrooy appoints ex-Manchester United coach at Leicester City

arts.ttl: Gay Arsenal fan Matt Lucas takes aim at rainbow-refusenik footballers and reveals he has been abused and called a 'f***ing queer ****' at matches
arts.sum: It comes after devout Christian Marc Guehi chose to write 'I love Jesus' over his rainbow armband at the weekend, before wearing a second on Tuesday at Ipswich that read: 'Jesus loves you'.

arts.ttl: Manchester United undroppable could be asked to play in another new position vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has a defensive puzzle to solve ahead of Wednesday night's Premier League clash with Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United striker predicts what Ruben Amorin can do against Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United face Arsenal at the Emirates on Wednesday night in Ruben Amorim's toughest game since taking charge and Louis Saha predicts he can do this one thing

arts.ttl: Tyrell Malacia transfer claim rubbished – Reasons given for lack of interest in Manchester United player
arts.sum: Tyrell Malacia made his return to the Manchester United first-team last week. He started for Ruben Amorim’s side against Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League and while his performance wasn’t the most convincing, it was only the start of a potential resurgence under a new manager. arts.ttl: Man United players abandoned plans to wear LGBTQ+ jackets after Noussair Mazraoui religious stance
arts.sum: The Moroccan defender was joined by teammates in refusing to take part in the walkout due to his Muslim faith
